notes: Benelux DJI Enterprise partner that introduced Belgium's first mobile drone hub built around DJI Dock 3 at DronePort, enabling flexible autonomous operations and demos in Belgium.
Belgian drone ecosystem hub hosting DJI Dock 2 and DJI Dock 3 demonstrations, including a mobile Dock 3 hub used for BVLOS trials and education events.
Belgium-based provider of DJI Dock 3 stand-alone stations and 24/7 fixed-surveillance bundles, targeting Belgium and Luxembourg for security and industrial monitoring.
DJI's Dock and enterprise dealer pages list Belgium within the C6-certified EU region for Dock 3 and Dock 2 operations, confirming official availability via Belgian enterprise partners.
